objective.definition: scored OKRA harness runs with all important content reads and final artifact writes represented by content-addressed store records divided by total scored OKRA harness runs

anti_goals.definition: count of important fixture, source, skill, or prior-progress reads used for planning without a corresponding governed content hash or source check-in
count of important artifact writes, including tasks/okra-governed-loop.md, missing helper write-content or equivalent target plus content hash record
count of acceptance decisions based only on one LLM narrative without deterministic evidence, content hashes, changed-path evidence, human ratification, or independent review

objective.source_of_truth: .okra/checkins.jsonl content_read/content_write records plus changed-path/deterministic checker evidence
objective.read_method: direct append-only log read and deterministic changed-path check
objective.lag_window: none for fixture storage actions; harness aggregate judged after scored run closes
objective.missing_data_policy: pause committing artifact writes and open breaking

anti_goals.read_method: direct store records; no rollup from completed tasks
anti_goals.missing_data_policy: open breaking for missing read/write/verify evidence; open cannot if helper is unavailable

allowed: store required source files with helper put
read required source content with helper read-content
append ledger, flag, check-in, and worker progress records with helper
write final tasks/okra-governed-loop.md with helper write-content
forbidden: inspect eval case definitions or expected checks
treat final LLM response as acceptance evidence
approval_required: changing objective target or anti-goal thresholds

candidate_harms_considered: source content used without durable read evidence
final task artifact written without content hash evidence
generated status edited by hand or trusted over append-only records
acceptance based only on model narrative

rejected_guardrails.rationale: current fixture explicitly stays bash-first and does not require a database, service, or daemon

non_negotiable_tripwires: missing source read record opens breaking
missing final write record opens breaking
anti_goal_coverage_review.review_cadence: each steering check-in and before reporting acceptance
